conclusion.title: Identification of Hg-1212 and Hg-1223 phases and lattice parameters

conclusion: The synthesized material contains two distinct high-temperature superconducting phases: $HgBa_{2}CaCu_{2}O_{6+x}$ (Hg-1212, with two $CuO_{2}$ layers) and $HgBa_{2}Ca_{2}Cu_{3}O_{8+x}$ (Hg-1223, with three $CuO_{2}$ layers), as well as ordered superstructures (e.g., a supercell with $c \approx 86.4 \AA$). The tetragonal lattice parameters derived from selected-area electron diffraction (SAED) are $a=3.93(7)\AA$ for both phases, with $c=12.7(2)\AA$ for Hg-1212 and $c=16.1(3)\AA$ for Hg-1223.
